Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start &DeOndeVem = 'ORDEMCARREGAMENTO' &PedidosSelecionados = 'SEL_WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &IsTodosMarcados = True RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon009_FecharComEstoque, &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) &PedStsGer = nullvalue(&PedStsGer) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Ordem Carregamento' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Decrescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Crescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Ordem') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Pedido') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Razão/Nome Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Previsão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Faturado') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Bruto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Líquido ') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'Lcto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(12, 'Vend.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 &PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO EndIF &IsMarcado = false do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event Refresh BtnMarcarTodos.Caption = 'Marcar' BtnMarcarTodos.Tooltiptext = 'Marcar' &IsTodosMarcados = true &OldPedCliCod = &PedCliCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWOrdemCarregamentoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWOrdemCarregamentoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf &IsMarcado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible PedCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible PedCodOciRef.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible PedCliCodRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible PedDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &NovoStatus.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible PedDtaPrv.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible PedDtaFat.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &AuxEst.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible &AuxFin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible PedVlrBrt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible PedVlrLiq.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible LctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible PedVenCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &IsUmReferenciado = RetornaUmPedidoReferencia.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NovoEditar = !'' &comboAcoes.Clear() &comboAcoes.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &comboAcoes.AddItem(1, 'Ref./Ane./Cot.') If ((PedSts in (Status_Pedido.ABERTO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)) and (LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum) and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(2, 'Emitir Nota') Endif If (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(3, 'Abrir Estoque') Endif If (not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(4, 'Fechar Estoque') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(5, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(6, 'Alterar Financeiro') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(7, 'Críticas Pedido') If (PedSts <> 'F' and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(8, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(9, 'Histórico Cliente') &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' &NovoStatus = trim(PedNovStsNom) &AuxEst = UPPER(Substr(PedSts.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PedCliCodRaz.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) &NovoEditar.Link = wpOrdemCarregamentos.Link('WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO', Trnmode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If &IsAutorizado = false &NovoEditar = !'' &NovoEditar.TooltipText = "Visualizar Ordem" &NovoEditar.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Endif If LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsNom, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatus.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) &AuxPedCod = PedCod &IsMarcado = false do 'IsSelecionado' EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWOrdemCarregamentoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &comboAcoes.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &comboAcoes = 1 Do 'Do RefAnexos' Case &comboAcoes = 2 Do 'Do EmitirNFe' Case &comboAcoes = 3 Do 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 4 Do 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 5 Do 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 6 Do 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' Case &comboAcoes = 7 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &comboAcoes = 8 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 9 Do 'Do HistoricoCliente' EndCase &comboAcoes = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAbrirPedidoVenda.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNovoInserir' wpOrdemCarregamentos.Link('WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO',Trnmode.Insert, &EmpCod, &FilCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTotalizar' RetornaTotalPedidosVendaGrid.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedSts, &PedStsFin, &PedCliCod, &PedStsCrd, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &LctCod1, &PedVenCod1, 'V', &FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) //wpTotalizaPedidos.Popup(&FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Totalizar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Totalizar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpTotalizaPedidos.Create(&FinMedioMoeda, &medioMoeda, &PedidoMoeda, &QtdPedidos, &FinQtdPedido, &FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcarTodos' If &IsTodosMarcados = True BtnMarcarTodos.Caption = 'Desmarcar' BtnMarcarTodos.Tooltiptext = 'Desmarcar' &IsTodosMarcados = false Else BtnMarcarTodos.Caption = 'Marcar' BtnMarcarTodos.Tooltiptext = 'Marcar' &IsTodosMarcados = true EndIf If &IsTodosMarcados = False For Each Line &IsMarcado = true &IsAchou = false For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtPedidosItem = New() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &SdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF do 'txtMarcados' EndFor Else For Each Line &IsMarcado = false For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &Index = &sdtPedidos.IndexOf(&sdtPedidosItem) &sdtPedidos.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndFor EndIf do 'txtMarcados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImprimirSelecionadas' Do 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&IsMarcado", '', !'#', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCod", '', !'Ordem', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCodOciRef", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCliCodRaz", '', !'Razão/Nome Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&NovoStatus", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaPrv", '', !'Previsão', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaFat", '', !'Faturado', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxEst", '', !'Est.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxFin", '', !'Fin.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrBrt", '', !'Bruto', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrLiq", '', !'Líquido ', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"LctCod", '', !'Lcto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVenCod", '', !'Vend.', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWOrdemCarregamentoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False &PedVenCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False &PedVenCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False &PedVenCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RefAnexos' wpReferenciasComerciais.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNFe' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &Mensagem) &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento = true If PedStsGer = Pedido_gerado.OrdemCarregamento ValidaItemSelecionaOrdemCarregamento.call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento) endif Do Case Case &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento = false msg('Ordem de Carregamento com Quantidades Superiores ao Pedido Origem') Case &IsTodosInformados <> true wpinformalotesfaltantespedidoVenda.Link('WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' and &IsPodeFaturar = false msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Case LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum msg('Pedido em Operação que não atualiza saldos, não permitido para fazer nota!') Case (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) And (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) msg('Somente pedidos com o status estoque "ABERTO" ou "SEPARANDO" pode fazer nota!') Otherwise GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosNFe.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAABREESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Abrir Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAABREESTOQUE]') EndIF Else msg('Opção Disponível somente pedido diferentes de Abertos!') EndiF EndSub Sub 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 if not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) &PedQtd = RetornaQuantidadePedidoOrdem.udp(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCodOciRef) &PedQtdDsp = &PedQtd - RetornaQtdRetirada.Udp(EmpCod,FilCod,0,PedCodOciRef) If &PedQtdDsp > 0 &IsClienteComCredito = true do 'VerificaCreditoCliente' IF LctAtuEst in (Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada, Status_EntradaSaida.Saida) &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &Mensagem) &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento = true If PedStsGer = Pedido_gerado.OrdemCarregamento ValidaItemSelecionaOrdemCarregamento.call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento) endif Do Case Case &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento = false msg('Ordem de Carregamento com Quantidades Superiores ao Pedido Origem') Case &IsTodosInformados <> true wpinformalotesfaltantespedidoVenda.Link('WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case &IsClienteComCredito = false msg('Crédito do cliente atingido, Solicite liberação de limite crédito para o pedido! [CONF210]') Case &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' and &IsPodeFaturar = false msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Otherwise wpFecharOrdemCarregamento.Link(upper(&Pgmname), EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Else wpFecharOrdemCarregamento.Link(upper(&Pgmname), EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf Else msg('Quantidade não disponível para fechamento do pedido! Verifique!') EndIf Else msg('Pedido já Fechado ou Cancelado!') EndIF Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 wpPedido_FechaFinanceiro.Link('WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 0, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 wpPedido_FechaFinanceiro.Link('WWORDEMCARREGAMENTO', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 0, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO msg('Somente Pedidos Abertos podem ser Cancelados!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDACANCELARPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) If &AutNiv > 0 if &IsAutorizado = true wpCancelarPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh Else msg('Você não tem acesso para alterar Excluir Pedido nesse Status!') EndIF else msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Cancelar Pedido de Venda. [VENDACANCELARPEDIDO]') endif EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do HistoricoCliente' wwhistoricoCliente.Link(PedCliCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCODOCIREF" &PedCodOciRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSCOD" &PedNovStsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLIRAZ" &PedCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSGER" &PedStsGer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWPedidoVendaColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCODOCIREF", "", not &PedCodOciRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCodOciRef.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSCOD", "", not &PedNovStsCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLIRAZ", "", not &PedCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSGER", "", not &PedStsGer.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsGer, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIf EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"PedidoVenda" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoInsert' &WebSession.remove('WPOrdem_Data') EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtPedidos.Clear() do 'txtMarcados' Refresh EndEvent Event PedidosSelecionados.Click wpPedidoSelecionado.Popup(&PedidosSelecionados) Refresh EndEvent Event &IsMarcado.Click &IsAchou = false If &IsMarcado = true //TRUE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtPedidosItem = New() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &SdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF Else //FALSE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &Index = &sdtPedidos.IndexOf(&sdtPedidosItem) &sdtPedidos.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'txtMarcados' EndEvent Event 'F4' 4 PromptCliente.Popup(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod) &PedCliCod.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &ImprimirPedido.Click // wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) &Varchar = ServerTime() &NomeArquivo = 'PedidoVenda' + trim(str(&PedCod)) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS002.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &wwpContext.PesCod, &NomeArquivo, 'N', &Varchar, false, false) // RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS113.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &PesCod, &NomeArquivo, 'N', &Varchar, false) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click Msg('Consulte o Suporte') // wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &PedCliCod.IsValid If &OldPedCliCod <> &PedCliCod Refresh EndIF EndEvent Sub 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' if &SdtPedidos.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('VARIOSPEDIDOSVENDA', &SdtPedidos.ToJson()) wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(&EmpCod, &FilCod, 0) Else msg('Nenhum pedido para ser impresso!') EndIF EndSub Sub 'txtMarcados' &numeric = &SdtPedidos.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Ordens Marcadas' padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtPedidos.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') &SdtPedidos.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'txtMarcados' EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos If &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod &IsMarcado = true EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'VerificaCreditoCliente' If &ControleCreditoCliente = 'S' and LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria //Controla Credito do Cliente &DebitoMoeda = RetornaCreditoDisponivelCliente.UDP(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod) If (&DebitoMoeda + PedVlrLiq) > PedCliCrd &ValorLiberadoMoeda = RetornaValorAutorizadoPedido.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedCliCod) If &ValorLiberadoMoeda < PedVlrLiq &IsClienteComCredito = false EndIF EndIF EndIf EndSub //Sub 'Do CopiarPedido' // // WpCopiarPedidoVenda.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) // //EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
